parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human presenter filmed in a natural indoor setting with realistic lighting, shadows, and fluid movements. The app interface and text are digital overlays added in post-production.

characters.appearance: Young adult female with a slim build and fair complexion. She has long, dark, wavy hair and subtle makeup. Her facial features are East Asian.
characters.wardrobe: A loose-fitting white hoodie with small red text visible on the chest.
characters.demeanor: Casual, friendly, and informative, using frequent hand gestures to emphasize her points.

characters.appearance: A digital illustration of a young woman with blonde hair and fair skin, visible only as a small circular profile picture.
characters.wardrobe: Appears to be wearing a dark top.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, daytime. Natural light from a window on the right. Light-colored walls and a closed door in the background. A white mug with a clear lid is on the table.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with long dark wavy hair is centered in the frame, looking directly at the camera. She is wearing a white hoodie. She is sitting indoors, with a window to her right providing bright natural light that illuminates the side of her face. Behind her, there are light-colored walls and a closed door or closet. In the lower part of the frame, a white mug with a clear lid and a straw is visible. She is gesturing with her hands as she speaks. The lighting is soft and natural.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter speaks directly to the camera, introducing her language background and the challenges of learning English. Text overlays appear on screen, translating her speech between English and Japanese. A play button icon with the app name 'Fluently' pops up briefly.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Until I was 7 years old, the only languages I could speak was Korean and Japanese.
Character A says: 英語を喋らないといけないような環境に私はいたので自然に喋れるようになったんですけど、 [I was in an environment where I had to speak English, so I naturally became able to speak it, but]
Character A says: 英語喋ってる環境じゃないのに会話を通して英語を学ぼうって言われても [even if you're told to learn English through conversation when you're not in an English-speaking environment,]
Character A says: It's like, how do I do that?
Character A says: So that's why I want to recommend Fluently to you guys.
Character A says: So me and my AI teacher,
scenes.on_screen_text:
Until I was 7 years old, 7歳まで、
the only languages I could speak was 話せた言葉は
Korean and Japanese 韓国語と日本語だけだったんだ
I was in an environment 英語を喋らないといけないような環境に
where I had to speak English いたので事前に喋れるようになった
If you're in an 英語喋ってる環境じゃないのに
yet people tell you to 会話を通して学ぼう！って言われても
learn through conversations 会話を通して学ぼう！って言われても
It's like どうやるの？
How do I do that? どうやるの？
Fluently をおすすめします
me and my AI teacher, AIの先生と

scenes.setting: Indoor room, daytime. Natural light from a window on the right. Light-colored walls and a closed door in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with long dark wavy hair is centered in the frame, looking slightly off-camera or directly at the lens. She is wearing a white hoodie. She is sitting indoors, with a window to her right providing bright natural light. Behind her, there are light-colored walls and a closed door or closet. She is gesturing with her hands and occasionally touching her face or hair. The lighting remains soft and natural throughout the shot.

scenes.visual_description: The woman continues to speak, but a large rectangular inset of a mobile app interface is superimposed over her chest area. The app shows a simulated voice call with an AI avatar, displaying text of the conversation. The woman interacts with the app, speaking to it and listening to its responses. The app interface changes to show real-time text correction and then a final evaluation score with a radar chart. Text overlays in English and Japanese appear on the screen, translating her speech and highlighting app features.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: we've been talking about podcasts, right?
Character A says: So one of the questions I can choose is like, what's your perfect opening questions for guests?
Character B says: Hey Gia, how's your afternoon going? Ready to talk about perfect opening questions?
Character A says: Okay, imagine you're welcoming a guest onto your podcast.
Character B says: What's the first question you'd ask?
Character A says: I like to ask them questions about their background so I can figure out what shaped them to become the person that they are today.
Character B says: That makes total sense! Childhood stories always reveal so much. Do you usually let them talk freely, or do you guide them with follow-up questions?
Character A says: Well, we do have a time limit, so I can't go over time, which is why I have to kind of cut them out. But yeah, I do try my best to let them talk freely.
Character B says: Ah, that's tricky - balancing flow and time!
Character A says: It evaluates the score right after.
Character A says: It's also not embarrassing because it's AI.
scenes.on_screen_text:
we've been talking about podcasts ポッドキャストについて話してるんだけど、
So one of the questions I can choose 選べる質問のひとつに
what's your perfect opening questions for guests? 「ゲストへの最高のオープニング質問は何？」
Hey Gia, how's your afternoon going? Ready to talk about perfect opening questions?
It's like you're talking to a real native speaker 本物のネイティブと会話をしてる感覚
Okay, imagine you're welcoming a guest onto your podcast.
What's the first question you'd ask?
They pinpoint your mistake right on the spot ミスをその場で直してくれるから超便利！
figure out what get to know their personality is
That makes total sense! Childhood stories always reveal so much. Do you usually let them talk freely, or do you guide them with follow-up questions?
Ah, that's tricky - balancing flow and time!
It evaluates the score right after すぐに点数を教えてくれる
Your English Level Advanced C1 74 out of 100
It's also not embarrassing because it's AI AIだから恥ずかしくならない

scenes.setting: Indoor room, daytime. Natural light from a window on the right. Light-colored walls and a closed door in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with long dark wavy hair is centered in the frame, looking directly at the camera. She is wearing a white hoodie. She is sitting indoors, with a window to her right providing bright natural light. Behind her, there are light-colored walls and a closed door or closet. She is gesturing emphatically with her hands, pointing towards the camera and holding up a finger. The lighting is soft and natural.

scenes.visual_description: The app overlay is gone. The presenter speaks directly to the camera, giving her final piece of advice. She uses strong hand gestures to emphasize her points. Text overlays appear on screen, translating her speech.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: I always say the best way to learn English is through conversations and through real life experiences. Number one.
scenes.on_screen_text:
I always say いつも言ってるけど
